title: Old F3 Debug Screen
description: Reverts the debug screen / hud to the look before 1.21.9
body:
# Description

Adds back the F3/Debug Screen that was in Minecraft before 1.21.9 if you don like the new version.


The mod will support more versions in the future but its only avalibe for 26.1 for now.

Planned Versions: 1.21.9-1.21.11
